title: Staggered Fade-in Animation

statement.markdown:
## Staggered Card Fade-in List

Build a staggered list grid fading cards sequentially.

### Requirements:
1. **Staggered Delays**: List cards fade-in step by step with custom delays (e.g. index-based increments).
2. **Smooth Fade**: Transitions scale cards and fade opacity simultaneously.
3. **Restart triggers**: Trigger buttons reset grid animations dynamically.

constraints: Must utilize transition-delay or custom animation-delay variables

starterCode.html:

C
starterCode.css: /* Implement transition properties and staggered item-index delays overrides here */

gradingCriteria.description: Verify cards fade-in sequentially rather than simultaneously.
Verify triggers reset card values and replay transitions seamlessly.
